titleStmt.title: SII 18.207: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 207. (B.K. No. 87 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Beam in the navaraṅga-maṇḍapa in the temple of Purasiddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 18th year of the reign of Siṁhaṇadēva, Sarvadhāri, Chaitra s11u. 7, Monday corresponding to A.D. 1228, March 13, Monday f.d.t. ·21. It records the gift of money made by Dechchi-seṭṭi and Māyi-seṭṭi, sons of Maili-seṭṭi of Guḍiyabīḍu, when Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Lakshmīpāḷadēva was the governor. The gift was entrusted to Jñānarāsidēva, for the worship, etc., of god Svayaṁbhu-Siddhanāthadēva of Hāvari (modern Hāvēri).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti śrīsiṁhaṇadēvavarṣada 18 neya sarvvahā(dhā)rīcasaṁvatsarada jaitra śa 7 sōmavāradaṁdu śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaranu saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara śrīlakṣmīpāḷadēvana rājya dalu
hāvariya śrīsvayaṁbhusiddhanāthadēvara śrīkāryyakke samastaguṇasaṁpaṁnanappa guḍiyabīḍina mailiseṭṭe(ṭṭi)ya putraru decciseṭṭi māyiseṭṭiyaru Akhaṁ ḍanaṁdādīvigege gadyāṇaveraḍu puṟpakke gadyāṇavoṁdaṁtu mūṟu hoṁge varṣada baḍḍi paṇa voṁdu
vāgi śrīmadrājaguru jñānarāsidēvara kayyalu koṭṭu Ī dāyinuṁ besasiyenalu . nimage caṁdrārkkasthāyiyaṁbaraṁ saluttamire maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 18.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
